basics.name: Byungwoo Yoo
basics.label: CTO / Software Engineer
basics.summary: Inspired by a professor's words, 'You have received the best education at a lower cost, so you must dedicate yourself to the country and its people,' I have worked as a core developer for LINE Messenger, used by 600 million people worldwide, and have experience in entrepreneurship and exit in the US. I have also led AI labs at top ed-tech companies in Korea and currently serve as CTO at Datarize.

work.name: Datarize
work.summary: CRM SaaS platform for e-commerce operators
highlights: Established technical roadmaps and managed hiring and organization for BE, FE, Data, QA, and SDK chapters
Led AX transformation across the company and drove AI hackathons, resulting in the launch of three AI products
Designed enterprise-oriented APIs and handled technical sales

work.name: Mathpresso
work.position: VP of Engineering / AI Lab Lead
work.summary: Operator of QANDA, an AI-based math problem-solving search platform
highlights: Led the only profitable B2B business unit, providing AI solutions to major educational companies such as Mirae, Visang, and YBM
Led multiple AI research projects, including ML, search, and automatic calculator and content DB development
Redesigned search and ML services based on domain-driven design, reducing infrastructure costs by over 50%

work.name: Kasa Korea
work.summary: Operator of Kasa, a blockchain-based real estate investment and trading platform
highlights: Oversaw the development of various features for API servers and trading engines, leading to the successful launch of the service

work.name: Buzzvil
work.summary: Operator of Buzzscreen, the world's largest smartphone lock screen advertising platform (used by over 2 million people daily)
highlights: Developed and managed ad and content allocation logic for Buzzscreen
Optimized search functionality, reducing infrastructure costs by 75% and improving response times
As a software architect, guided other engineers in building robust and sustainable microservices using Clean Architecture and DDD, ensuring zero downtime

work.name: Slidejoy
highlights: Reached break-even point and secured funding before being acquired
Designed and developed the service using ad networks, and introduced Spring Boot for the backend

work.name: NAVER
highlights: Improved transmission rates (75% to 99.5%) as the lead developer for NNI (NHN Notification Infra), a core library for LINE, and gained experience with overseas deployments and on-site debugging
Developed and contributed to the Android version of the Netty network library as open-source
Introduced MVP software design, significantly enhancing team performance

work.name: InfoBank / DOSA
work.summary: Worked at InfoBank and DOSA as part of my military service
highlights: Participated in the development of m&Talk and Samsung ChatON

education.area: Department of Electrical Engineering (minor in Business Administration)

publications.name: Explain with Visual Keypoints Like a Real Mentor! A Benchmark for Multimodal Solution Explanation
publications.summary: Proposed a multimodal benchmark (MathExplain) for identifying and explaining visual keypoints in math problem-solving explanations. Co-authored.

volunteer.summary: Provided AI policy and technical advice to Gyeonggi Province
highlights: Advised on the construction of Gyeonggi Province's generative AI project and conducted technical reviews
